title: deer-flow.otel.span v1
description: OpenTelemetry span bridged to nervous-bus via deer-flow's _BusBridgeSpanProcessor.on_end(). Only spans carrying a thread_id attribute are emitted (startup/shutdown spans dropped). Enabled by env DEERFLOW_OTEL_BRIDGE_BUS=1. Emit site: deer-flow/backend/packages/harness/deerflow/bus.py:1105 (emit_otel_span_event). Source: /deer-flow/harness.

trace_id.description: OTel trace id, 32 lowercase hex chars

span_id.description: OTel span id, 16 lowercase hex chars

parent_span_id.description: 16 lowercase hex chars, or null for root spans

attributes.description: Whitelisted span attributes (other keys are stripped at the bridge). Permitted keys: agent_name, tool_name, model_name, finish_reason, error, error.type, status_code, thread_id, deerflow.agent_name, deerflow.tool_name, deerflow.model_name, deerflow.thread_id, deerflow.run_id

start_time_unix_nano.description: Span start time as nanoseconds since the epoch

duration_ms.description: Span duration in ms, rounded to 2 decimals

status_code.description: OTel status enum name (e.g. OK, ERROR); emitted when span.status is set

status_message.description: OTel status description; emitted when set
